events.title: Birth of the Buddha
events.description: Siddhartha Gautama was born in Lumbini (present-day Nepal) as a prince of the Shakya clan.

events.title: Enlightenment (Bodhi)
events.description: At age 35, Siddhartha attained enlightenment under the Bodhi tree at Bodh Gaya, becoming the Buddha.

events.title: First Sermon (Dhammacakkappavattana)
events.description: The Buddha delivered his first teaching at Deer Park in Sarnath, setting the Wheel of Dhamma in motion.

events.title: Mahaparinirvana
events.description: The Buddha passed away at Kushinagar at age 80, entering final nirvana.

events.title: First Buddhist Council
events.description: Held at Rajagaha under King Ajatasattu, presided by Mahakassapa. The Vinaya and Suttas were recited.

events.title: Second Buddhist Council
events.description: Held at Vesali to address disputes over monastic rules.

events.title: Third Buddhist Council
events.description: Held at Pataliputra under Emperor Ashoka, led by Moggaliputta Tissa.
